scripts.clean: npm run clean --workspaces && npm run clean:termux-tarballs
scripts.clean:termux-tarballs: shx rm -f neosantara-ai-*.tgz neosantara-agent-core-*.tgz neosantara-code-*.tgz neosantara-tui-*.tgz neosantara-web-*.tgz
scripts.build: npm run build -w @neosantara/tui && npm run build -w @neosantara/ai && npm run build -w @neosantara/agent-core && npm run build -w @neosantara/code
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "ai,agent,coding-agent,tui" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow,red,magenta" "npm run dev -w @neosantara/ai" "npm run dev -w @neosantara/agent-core" "npm run dev -w @neosantara/code" "npm run dev -w @neosantara/tui"
scripts.build:install-assets: npm run build && npm run build:termux-bundle && npm --prefix .. run sync:neo-code-install
scripts.test: npm --prefix packages/tui test && npm --prefix packages/agent test && npm --prefix packages/ai test && npm --prefix packages/coding-agent test
scripts.version:patch: npm version patch -ws --no-git-tag-version && node scripts/sync-versions.js && npm install --package-lock-only --ignore-scripts
scripts.version:minor: npm version minor -ws --no-git-tag-version && node scripts/sync-versions.js && npm install --package-lock-only --ignore-scripts
scripts.version:major: npm version major -ws --no-git-tag-version && node scripts/sync-versions.js && npm install --package-lock-only --ignore-scripts
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run check
scripts.publish: npm run prepublishOnly && npm publish -ws --access public
scripts.publish:dry: npm run prepublishOnly && npm publish -ws --access public --dry-run
